Portal visibility

Every case trackable in real time, synced to your CMS.

We organize — we don't argue.

We assemble a complete, accurate record and return it to your firm. We never characterize, value, or argue the record, and we don't draft demands. What you do with the file is entirely your firm's call.

People, not paperwork

Your client is cared for.
Your case keeps moving.

From the first call to a complete record, one coordinator stays with every case.

The Attorney Portal

Every case you submit, tracked in one place.

See where each client is in care, what's outstanding, and when the record is complete — without chasing a single provider.

  • Live treatment status on every case
  • Appointment, gap-in-care, and records milestones at a glance
  • Records & bills retrieval progress per case
  • Status synced to your case-management system where supported

Newsletter & updates

Coordination tips and product updates for PI firms — once a month, no noise.

About our services. Injury SOS medical-care coordination and Injury SOS funding brokerage are separate, independent service lines. They share a name and a website, but nothing else: no case information, no economics, and no referrals pass between them. Coordination is free to your firm, and we take nothing of value for any provider placement — any fee a provider may pay in the future would be a flat technology-subscription fee only, never tied to placements, case volume, or case value.
Injury SOS coordinates the logistics of medical care on the provider you or your client selects; it does not select, rank, recommend, or steer patients to any provider, gives no medical or legal advice, and is not a law firm or a medical provider. The medical record we assemble is organized, not characterized or valued. Coordination is free to the firm; any future provider fee is a flat technology-subscription fee only, never a payment for any referral or placement. This website is informational and is not legal, medical, or financial advice. © 2026 Injury SOS. All rights reserved.
Funding access — a separate service

Two funding paths.

We broker only — we never lend or advance capital, and we're paid by independent funders, not by you or your clients.

This is a separate service from our free medical coordination. Injury SOS funding brokerage shares our name and website but is operated independently. No case information, coordination data, economics, or referrals pass between funding and coordination. Choosing funding is never a condition of coordination, and coordination is never a condition of funding.
For your clients

Plaintiff funding

Non-recourse pre-settlement funding so clients aren't pressured to settle early.

  • Non-recourse — repaid only from a recovery
  • Independent funders supply all capital & underwriting
  • One application, routed to a multi-funder panel
  • No cost to your firm
Apply — routed to independent funders
For your firm

Law-firm funding

Business-purpose portfolio financing against your case inventory — brokered to an independent funder panel.

  • Business-purpose financing for the firm as a borrower
  • Independent funders supply all capital & underwriting
  • Funder agreements preserve your control of settlement
  • Funder-paid brokerage — never tied to your recovered fees
Apply — routed to independent funders
How we're paid. Injury SOS is a marketing-and-origination broker. We advance no capital, underwrite nothing, take no assignment of or interest in any recovery, and acquire no interest in any law-firm fee. We are paid by the independent funders — never by plaintiffs, never by your firm out of its fees, and never as a share of any recovery. Funding availability, terms, and registration vary by state.

Funding is offered through independent third-party funders who supply all capital and perform all underwriting. Injury SOS does not lend, advance funds, or guarantee funding, and is not a party to any funding agreement. Pre-settlement funding is non-recourse and is not a loan. This page is informational and is not legal or financial advice. Funding is not available in all states.

Injury SOS funding brokerage routes each applicant to independent funders who supply all capital and underwriting. Injury SOS is not a funder or lender.

Services
  • Medical coordination (free)
  • Funding (separate service)
Separate service lines. Injury SOS funding brokerage and Injury SOS medical coordination are operated independently. No case information, economics, or referrals pass between them.
